team.name: Dr. Richard Adu-Acheampong
team.title: Ag. Executive Director
team.description: Leads the strategic direction and overall management of CHED operations across Ghana. Former Senior Researcher at Cocoa Research Institute of Ghana.

team.name: Mr. Abdul-Majid Mumuni
team.title: Ag. Deputy Executive Director (Operations)
team.description: Oversees field operations and coordinates extension services across all regions. Responsible for operational efficiency and program implementation.

team.name: Mrs. Margaret Frimpong Ayerakwa
team.title: Ag. Deputy Executive Director (Extension)
team.description: Leads farmer education programs and extension services. Specialist in agricultural extension and gender dynamics in cocoa farming.

team.name: Mrs. Dorine Fanny Amartey
team.title: Deputy Director, Human Resource
team.description: Manages human resources operations and talent development. Extensive experience in HR management at Ghana Cocoa Board.

team.name: Mr. Abukari Abdullai
team.title: Cartography Manager
team.description: Oversees mapping and geographical information systems for cocoa farm monitoring and rehabilitation programs.

team.name: Mrs. Yvonne
team.title: Deputy Director Finance
team.description: Manages financial operations and budgetary controls for the division.

team.name: Mr. Ephraim Ahorlu
team.title: Deputy Audit Manager
team.description: Responsible for internal audit processes and compliance monitoring across all regional offices.

team.name: Mr. Ernest Ayivor
team.title: Information Systems Manager
team.description: Leads IT infrastructure and digital transformation initiatives. Former Faculty Lecturer at Bunso Cocoa College.

team.name: Mr. Franklin Mensah
team.title: Deputy Estates Manager
team.description: Manages estates and facilities operations for the division.
